_comment: Manual corrections for race-matching when automatic resolution fails. Start empty; add entries as you see mismatches in the logs.

_schema.tracks: Map of formfav-slug -> betfair-venue-name when normalisation rules don't match (e.g. 'gold-coast' -> 'Gold Coast (AUS)'). Keys lowercased slug-style.
_schema.horses: Map of formfav-name -> betfair-name when exact + fuzzy match both fail. Keys/values lowercased, punctuation stripped.
